The scene shows a view of Earth from space. The planet appears as a curved blue sphere with white cloud bands and brown landmasses, surrounded by a faint atmospheric glow. The view is framed by black borders at the top and bottom, giving it a cinematic quality.

As the camera pans across the planet, you can see the contrast between the illuminated day side and the dark night side. The night side reveals a network of bright city lights tracing the coastlines and inland areas, creating a striking pattern against the darkness.

The perspective is from a vantage point in space, looking down at Earth's surface. The overall composition emphasizes the planet's beauty and scale, with the curvature of the Earth clearly visible and the atmosphere creating a subtle halo effect around the planet's edge.

The scene shows the Universal Pictures logo being revealed against a cosmic backdrop. The logo appears as large, metallic silver letters with gold trim that rotate into view, gradually coming to rest in the center of the frame. Behind the logo, you can see a detailed view of Earth at night with illuminated city lights tracing the continents, all set against a star-filled space background with a faint blue glow around the planet. The entire composition has a cinematic quality with black borders at the top and bottom, creating a polished, professional presentation typical of a film studio's branding.

The scene shows a dramatic sky filled with thick, layered clouds in various shades of gray, white, and black. The clouds are densely packed and textured, creating a moody, atmospheric quality. The entire scene has a cinematic quality, with the clouds dominating the frame and creating a striking visual impact.
